def positive_transaction_scope_split_across_unrelated_helpers():
    rule_id = "transaction_scope_split_across_unrelated_helpers"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag flows where begin, commit, and rollback responsibilities are scattered across helpers with no single owner."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
